title: Rebuild booklet
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild booklet             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 28, 2013 10:31 pm I bought Evangelion 1.11 and 2.22 on blu-ray here in Spain. They were packaged together in a special edition, and this edition included a booklet. I'm positive that these booklets are from Japan and were translated, and that they were not written here in Spain. I think in the USA there was a 2.22 booklet, but, where do they come from? Were they included in the blu-ray in Japan? I don't want to buy the Evangelion 3.33 blu-ray if there is a booklet and I don't get it. What should I do?

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Feb 28, 2013 10:45 pm I believe the booklet comes in all special edition copies of the movie. I got 1.11 and 2.22 here in the U.S. and they came with the booklet, and I know that the Japanese 1.11 & 2.22 have the booklet. I wanna see the 3.33 booklet so bad cause I enjoy reading the little description from Anno about the current rebuild movie he's talking about and his his view on it. I think it's pretty neat.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Feb 28, 2013 10:51 pm Yeah they come with the dvds and I remember hearing on the commentary that those booklets were translated in Japan rather than by the various distributors (ie funimation)

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 28, 2013 10:57 pm That's good, because the spanish distributor is shit in translations.
